news.title:
Zydus Wellness surged 13%, hitting a 52-week high of ₹552.4 on heavy volumes; trading 10% higher by 2 PM.
Stock outperformed Nifty 50, gaining 30% in a month and 55% YoY, despite Q3FY26 net loss of ₹39.9 crore.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness surged 13%, hitting a 52-week high of ₹552.4 on heavy volumes; trading 10% higher by 2 PM.
Stock outperformed Nifty 50, gaining 30% in a month and 55% YoY, despite Q3FY26 net loss of ₹39.9 crore.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness surged 18% on April 6, its biggest single-day gain since 2009.
Strong volumes of 2 crore shares backed the rally despite no major announcements.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness surged 18% on April 6, its biggest single-day gain since 2009.
Strong volumes of 2 crore shares backed the rally despite no major announcements.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness eyes diversified growth via Comfort Click, RiteBite, innovation, and legacy brands.
Comfort Click drives international growth; RiteBite scales fast with better margins and distribution.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness eyes diversified growth via Comfort Click, RiteBite, innovation, and legacy brands.
Comfort Click drives international growth; RiteBite scales fast with better margins and distribution.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy surged 23.2x in volume to 72.71L shares, up 6.2% to Rs.908.2.
Zydus Wellness saw a 17.2x volume rise to 6.87L shares, up 12% to Rs.497.25.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy surged 23.2x in volume to 72.71L shares, up 6.2% to Rs.908.2.
Zydus Wellness saw a 17.2x volume rise to 6.87L shares, up 12% to Rs.497.25.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness faces EUR 19,472.6 VAT penalty from Spanish tax authority.
The company plans to appeal the penalty imposed by the Spanish court.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness faces EUR 19,472.6 VAT penalty from Spanish tax authority.
The company plans to appeal the penalty imposed by the Spanish court.

news.title:
Rising input costs, West Asia conflict, and weak rupee pressure FMCG margins; durable goods firms plan price hikes.
FMCG firms to stagger price hikes starting with 3-4% in April; urban FMCG value growth contracts by 4-5% in March.
news.summary:
Rising input costs, West Asia conflict, and weak rupee pressure FMCG margins; durable goods firms plan price hikes.
FMCG firms to stagger price hikes starting with 3-4% in April; urban FMCG value growth contracts by 4-5% in March.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness presents investor updates under Regulation 30 with details on recent milestones, financial highlights, and global expansion.
Investor presentation includes forward-looking strategies, strong portfolio performance, double-digit growth, and ESG improvements, uploaded on their website.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness presents investor updates under Regulation 30 with details on recent milestones, financial highlights, and global expansion.
Investor presentation includes forward-looking strategies, strong portfolio performance, double-digit growth, and ESG improvements, uploaded on their website.

news.title: NK Securities Research sold 3,136,345 shares of Zydus Wellness at an avg price of 428.8.
news.summary: NK Securities Research sold 3,136,345 shares of Zydus Wellness at an avg price of 428.8.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness faces operational challenges due to PNG and LPG supply disruptions.
West Asia conflict escalates energy volatility, impacting packaged food sector.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness faces operational challenges due to PNG and LPG supply disruptions.
West Asia conflict escalates energy volatility, impacting packaged food sector.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness to participate in Non-Deal Roadshow on March 18-19, 2026.
Organized by Motilal Oswal Capital Markets in Singapore for investor meetings.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness to participate in Non-Deal Roadshow on March 18-19, 2026.
Organized by Motilal Oswal Capital Markets in Singapore for investor meetings.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness reported record net sales of ₹964.9 crore in Dec 2025.
Despite high sales, profitability plunged, leading to a Mojo Grade downgrade to Sell.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness reported record net sales of ₹964.9 crore in Dec 2025.
Despite high sales, profitability plunged, leading to a Mojo Grade downgrade to Sell.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness released Q3 FY26 results, reporting notable growth with net sales up 38.4% YoY to INR 24,639M. Gross margin expanded to 57.5%.
Major brands like Sugar Free, Complan, and RiteBite showed strong growth. RiteBite expanded to 9 markets and Sugar Free retained a 96.3% market share.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness released Q3 FY26 results, reporting notable growth with net sales up 38.4% YoY to INR 24,639M. Gross margin expanded to 57.5%.
Major brands like Sugar Free, Complan, and RiteBite showed strong growth. RiteBite expanded to 9 markets and Sugar Free retained a 96.3% market share.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹610M vs ₹148M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 6.3% from 3.2% YoY.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹610M vs ₹148M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 6.3% from 3.2% YoY.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness announces investor call on Feb 3, 2026, post Q3FY26 results.
Call will feature Chairman, CEO, CFO; access details provided for global participants.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness announces investor call on Feb 3, 2026, post Q3FY26 results.
Call will feature Chairman, CEO, CFO; access details provided for global participants.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness's stock is up 47% over three years despite a 5.7% annualized EPS decline.
Recent TSR improvement at 13% yearly suggests potential business performance improvement.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness's stock is up 47% over three years despite a 5.7% annualized EPS decline.
Recent TSR improvement at 13% yearly suggests potential business performance improvement.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness clarifies the recent volume increase in its equity shares as market-driven.
The company states no undisclosed events or announcements affect share price/volume.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness clarifies the recent volume increase in its equity shares as market-driven.
The company states no undisclosed events or announcements affect share price/volume.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness saw a 23.7x volume surge to 1.42L shares, gaining 6.9% to Rs.453.2. Swan Corp volumes rose 20x to 15.06L, up 0.35% to Rs.472.55.
Blue Star volume surged 8.8x to 1.45L shares, up 0.74% to Rs.1720.4. JSW Steel and Deepak Fertilisers also saw significant volume and price increases.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness saw a 23.7x volume surge to 1.42L shares, gaining 6.9% to Rs.453.2. Swan Corp volumes rose 20x to 15.06L, up 0.35% to Rs.472.55.
Blue Star volume surged 8.8x to 1.45L shares, up 0.74% to Rs.1720.4. JSW Steel and Deepak Fertilisers also saw significant volume and price increases.

news.title:
FMCG raw material costs show mixed trends; cereals soften, coffee prices stay firm.
Tea and cocoa prices remain subdued per Equirius Securities' report on FMCG inputs.
news.summary:
FMCG raw material costs show mixed trends; cereals soften, coffee prices stay firm.
Tea and cocoa prices remain subdued per Equirius Securities' report on FMCG inputs.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness closed at 435.2, down 5.95 or 1.35% on 26 Nov.
The decline follows weak quarterly earnings and low investor participation.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness closed at 435.2, down 5.95 or 1.35% on 26 Nov.
The decline follows weak quarterly earnings and low investor participation.

news.title:
Zydus Wellness reported Q2 FY2026 net sales growth of 31%, driven by resilient non-seasonal portfolio and newly acquired Comfort Click, despite seasonal challenges.
Comfort Click acquisition, funded via low-cost loan, expands Zydus' global digital healthcare presence; integration and new launches like Nutralite Activ Peanut Butter bode well for growth.
news.summary:
Zydus Wellness reported Q2 FY2026 net sales growth of 31%, driven by resilient non-seasonal portfolio and newly acquired Comfort Click, despite seasonal challenges.
Comfort Click acquisition, funded via low-cost loan, expands Zydus' global digital healthcare presence; integration and new launches like Nutralite Activ Peanut Butter bode well for growth.
